_about: Bewiched EOS Scorecard data. Written by run_weekly.py pull_eos_scorecard(); rendered by gen_eos_scorecard.py. Live rows from BigQuery + F1/reviews/RMS feeds; manual rows from the EOS Scorecard Inputs sheet.

weekly.name: Google Health
weekly.note: Blend: avg of reviews÷40 and rating÷4.6, each capped 100%. Green at 100%.

weekly.name: Rate My Shift Health
weekly.detail: No Rate My Shift submissions logged last week
weekly.note: Blend: avg of submissions÷70 and avgScore÷4.6.

weekly.name: Brew Crew Kudos Participation
weekly.note: Manual weekly input. Enter % of team giving kudos in the EOS Scorecard Inputs sheet.

weekly.name: Social Media Engagement
weekly.note: Metric and target not yet defined.

weekly.name: SPH Labour (incl holiday pay)
weekly.detail: £168257 sales ÷ 2916 hours used (last week, 17 stores reporting hours)
weekly.note: Sales per labour hour incl holiday pay. Provisional on Sunday run; finalised Monday once planner hours post.

weekly.name: Bench
weekly.detail: 5 managers ready on the bench (HRP bench sheet)
weekly.note: Count of named Bench Managers in the HRP bench sheet. Green when ≥ 3. Override via the inputs sheet.

quarterly.name: YoY Sales Growth
quarterly.detail: LFL QTD sales vs same period last year (19 like-for-like stores)

quarterly.name: YoY Transactional Growth
quarterly.detail: LFL QTD transactions vs same period last year (19 like-for-like stores)

quarterly.name: Brand Audit Score
quarterly.detail: Estate average brand audit (QTD), out of 5
quarterly.note: Auto-derived from the Brand Audit sheet; override in the inputs sheet if needed.

quarterly.name: F1 Score
quarterly.note: CONFIRM SCALE: the F1 'Total Score' QTD estate avg is ~282 pts, not /100. Enter the figure on plan-75 scale in the inputs sheet, or update the plan.

quarterly.name: Net Profit After Tax (projected)
quarterly.note: Projected NPAT % of turnover. Not in POS data — enter from management accounts in the inputs sheet.

quarterly.name: Food GP%
quarterly.detail: Estate GP%% from Cost of Sales (currently 2 commercial stores)
quarterly.note: PROXY: company food-specific GP% not yet sourced — using CoS estate GP%. Override in the inputs sheet.

quarterly.name: New Starter Health
quarterly.note: Metric and target not yet defined.

flags: AMBER band = 5% under plan (config.amber_band). Bench is green when ≥3.
Google Health & Rate My Shift Health blends (reviews÷40 / rating÷4.6 ; submissions÷70 / score÷4.6) are default assumptions — adjust the divisors if you prefer different volume targets.
SPH Labour, Brew Crew Kudos, Bench, F1 Score, NPAT and Food GP% plans are Matt's stated defaults (50 / 50% / 3 / 75 / 18% / 71%).
F1 Score: scale needs confirming — the sheet's QTD Total Score averages ~282 pts, so a plan of 75 implies a different (e.g. /100) scale. Shown as TBC until a value on the plan scale is entered.
Net Profit After Tax % is not available from POS/BigQuery — it is a manual entry from management accounts.
Food GP% is shown from the Cost of Sales sheet (estate GP, 2 commercial stores) as a proxy until a company food-specific GP source exists.
Social Media Engagement and New Starter Health are greyed TBC placeholders pending metric + target definitions.

Manual inputs live in the new Google Sheet 'Bewiched EOS Scorecard Inputs' (ID 1HimYAjZg4zlMQG91-KUefkeYMPvrU4ddVuO2IuERTqg). It must be shared (Viewer) with dashboards-bot@bewiched-coffee-368116.iam.gserviceaccount.com for the automated run to read it.
